title: Dynamics Gui
body:
Custom GUI's are a great way to enhance the player experience on your Minecraft server.

Do you dread the process of creating GUI's for your Minecraft server, spending hours mired in confusing JSON files?
GUIPlus has the solution: our In-game GUI Editor. With this powerful tool, you can easily create custom GUI's in just a few minutes, all from within the game. No more frustrating, time-consuming setup - just quick and easy customization.

With support for PlaceholderAPI, Bungeecord, and Custom Command Aliases,
you can give your players the ultimate experience.

But don't just take our word for it - give GUIPlus a try and see for yourself how it can transform your server.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e3c5d9fd89ca485189b39e92fd7a7d233f6a047.png)
Command - Description - Permission
/gui - Shows the available commands - None
/gui open <name> - Open a specific GUI - gui.open
/gui openfor <player> <name> - Open a GUI for a Player - gui.open.other
/gui create <name> - Create a new GUI - gui.create
/gui delete <name> - Delete a GUI - gui.delete
/gui edit <name> - Edit a GUI - gui.edit
/gui list - Shows the available GUI’s. - gui.list
/gui reload - Reload the Plugin - gui.reload
